smokeTests.note: Plan asserted 'structural' but c1eb45f is a merge commit; merge commits return no files via `git show --name-only --pretty=format:` without -m. Output JSON is well-formed with all required fields.
Verified CLI correctness against a real non-merge commit touching prebuild.js — got bucket='structural', matchedCategories=['build-infrastructure'] as expected.

planDefects: Task 6 Step 2 used c1eb45f as the smoke-test SHA, but c1eb45f is a merge commit. With `git show --name-only --pretty=format:` (the CLI's default), merge commits emit no files, so the output buckets as 'clean'. The CLI implementation is correct; the plan's smoke-test expectation was wrong for that SHA. Independently verified on 0a7667f (a real prebuild-touching commit) → structural as expected.
notes: CLI block appended verbatim from the plan. All test suites pass, exit codes match plan, commit 78aeb99 landed. Task is functionally complete; the only deviation from plan text is the smoke-test SHA's expected bucket, which the plan got wrong — the CLI matches the plan's specification.
